name: kcc-design
description: Decompose one or more UI artifacts (web / iOS / Android — code, HTML, SwiftUI, Jetpack Compose, or prose) into a uniform hierarchical tree (Page → Section → Component → Element) and report what each supplied artifact says per facet (attributes / layout / motion) with nested property-value detail. Reports facts only — no classification, no recommendations, no TODO, no code generation. Accepts 1..N labeled inputs (single = pure decomposition; multi = N-way comparison). 外挂 style — no hardcoded paths or filenames; no silent file writes.
